name: HexaMatch
author: Poki
description: HexaMatch is a puzzle game where strategy meets number sequences! Move numbered tiles into their correct spots, but there’s a twist—each tile can only slide into the next available space. Use the extra empty slot wisely to shuffle and align the hexagons in as few moves as possible. Think ahead, plan your steps, and see if you can master the puzzle! How to play HexaMatch? Click or tap to select the tile, the tile will move to the next empty space automatically. Who created HexaMatch? HexaMatch is created by PixelOre. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play HexaMatch for free? You can play HexaMatch for free on Poki. Can I play HexaMatch on mobile devices and desktop? HexaMatch can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
